mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO dashboard_execution_trace (scan_id, turn_id, message_id, node_index, node_type, tool_name, tool_call_id, content, timestamp_ms, duration_ms, success, error_message) VALUES
(#{node.scanId}, #{node.turnId}, #{node.messageId}, #{node.nodeIndex}, #{node.nodeType}, #{node.toolName}, #{node.toolCallId}, #{node.content}, #{node.timestampMs}, #{node.durationMs}, #{node.success}, #{node.errorMessage})
